TestCase1.TestDescription: Verify Info message displayed when Control Module device is reachable
TestCase1.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 18 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase1.TestCaseHeader: Verify Info message displayed when Control Module device is reachable

VerifyMessage.MessageText: ControlModule - Hardware found : Device is reachable at the 18.

TestCase2.TestDescription: Verify Info message displayed when live Control Module device matches described device in destiny file
TestCase2.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase2.TestCaseHeader: Verify Info message displayed when live Control Module device matches described device in destiny file

VerifyMessage.MessageText: Peripheral EBP - Hardware Match : The specified device match with the live device at the 18.

TestCase3.TestDescription: Verify Error message displayed when Control Module device is not compatible
TestCase3.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase3.TestCaseHeader: Verify Error message displayed when Control Module device is not compatible

VerifyMessage.MessageText: My ControlModule - Hardware Incompatible : The specified device is not compatible with the live device at the 6.

TestCase4.TestDescription: Verify Error message displayed when Control Module device is not reachable
TestCase4.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase4.TestCaseHeader: Verify Error message displayed when Control Module device is not reachable

VerifyMessage.MessageText: My ControlModule - Hardware not found : The device at the 1 is not found. Please check the device connection and retry.

TestCase5.TestDescription: Verify Warning message displayed when Control Module device is not matching
TestCase5.Precondition: Set the Physical Ebus ID to 14 as a precondition to pass the test case
TestCase5.TestCaseHeader: Verify Error message displayed when Control Module device is not reachable

VerifyMessage.MessageText: Peripheral EBP - Hardware mismatch : The specified device does not match live device at the 18.
